author: anon-581fd578
content: Delivered phase 1: GPU presentation wired up. Created gpu.rs with GpuContext (wgpu v29 device/surface/queue, rect/text/shadow pipelines from existing SDF shaders, glyph atlas texture, globals uniform). Connected to event_loop: GpuContext initialized in resumed(), present_frame() called from submit_frame(), resize handled. PlatformWindow changed to Arc<Window> for surface creation. Background fills, borders, shadows should now render. Text shaping (NodeContent population) still needed for text to appear.
